calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate And Complaint And To Substitute Respondent; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Felicia Y Sze
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER ST. VINCENT MEDICAL CENTER'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate And Complaint And To Substitute Respondent is Off calendar. Order granting leave to file and serve first amended verified petition for writ of mandate entered pursuant to stipulation on 2/25/20.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
